bead.title: server/workers: migrate runWorker dispatch to LoadAndResolve + behavioral e2e
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Migrates the server worker dispatch at cli/internal/server/workers.go:878 to use config.LoadAndResolve + ExecuteBeadWorker.RunWithConfig. Each request loads the target project's config fresh (no cache); spec fields layer onto config as overrides via CLIOverrides/SpecOverrides.

This bead unblocks FEAT-022 G's server path — the most-used path in production since 'ddx work' submits to the running server by default.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/server/workers.go (around line 878 — runWorker)
- cli/internal/server/workers_e2e_test.go (new) — TestReviewRetryThresholdFromConfigServer

Out-of-scope:
- CLI dispatch (bead 7)
- GraphQL StartWorker (bead 9)

Depends on bead 6.5. See TD-024 §Dispatch site code shape.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestReviewRetryThresholdFromConfigServer ./internal/server/... passes: same shape as the CLI test in bead 7, against StartWorker→runWorker. cd cli && go test ./... passes.

events.body:
REQUEST_CHANGES
**`workers.go:892` swallows `LoadAndResolve` error**: `rcfg, _ := config.LoadAndResolve(projectRoot, overrides)` discards the error silently. If config is malformed the worker will run on a zero-value `ResolvedConfig` and (per SD-024 §1 sealed-construction) panic on first accessor. Either propagate the error to the worker record (preferred) or document why a load failure should hard-panic. Minor — not in AC but wort…
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T153657-d04bf483/reviewer-stream.log

post-merge review: REQUEST_CHANGES
**`workers.go:892` swallows `LoadAndResolve` error**: `rcfg, _ := config.LoadAndResolve(projectRoot, overrides)` discards the error silently. If config is malformed the worker will run on a zero-value `ResolvedConfig` and (per SD-024 §1 sealed-construction) panic on first accessor. Either propagate the error to the worker record (preferred) or document why a load failure should hard-panic. Minor — not in AC but worth fixing before merge.
**AC #2 not literally met**: pre-existing failures in `cli/cmd` (golden drift, installation tests requiring built binary) prevent `go test ./...` from passing. Either (a) confirm independently that base commit `e56ee4d3` exhibits the same failures and waive AC #2, or (b) gate this bead behind a small fix that restores green. Recommend confirming (a) and explicitly waiving rather than re-running this bead.
